# **Main Question**
***

:::{.main_question}
::::{.main_question_header}
Our main question(s)
::::
::::{.inner_block}
1. What latent transcriptional programs are present in IFN-beta stimulated and control PBMC single-cell RNA-seq data?
1. Can CoGAPS help distinguish broad stimulation-associated activity from cell-type-linked immune programs?
1. Which genes define the strongest IFN-associated pattern, and are those genes up or down in stimulation?
1. How does the IFN-associated pattern vary across annotated PBMC cell types?
::::
:::

***
